nodes.label: AVCPM Diff & History System  Provides git-like diff, blame, and history function
Get the path to a commit file, searching all branches if branch not specified.
Get the content of a file at a specific commit.
Read a file and return its lines.
Compare two files and return a unified diff.          Args:         file_a: Path
Compare two commits and return differences.          Args:         commit_a: Fir
Compare the tips of two branches.          Args:         branch_a: First branch
Show full details of a commit.          Args:         commit_id: Commit ID to sh
Get commit history.          Args:         branch: Branch to get history for (No
Show all versions of a file across commits.          Args:         filepath: Pat
Show line-by-line authorship for a file.          Args:         filepath: Path t
Format a unified diff as side-by-side for human readability.          Args:
Format diff result as JSON.          Args:         diff_result: Diff result dict
Format blame output for display.          Args:         blame_result: Blame resu
Print a list of commits in a formatted way.
CLI interface for diff and history commands.
